dialog_hooks: names the price of entry in ore, not coin
counts your weapons before your words
will trade news of the siege for a real meal
knows who is next to starve and does not share it
short_desc: A stocky dwarven captain in battered plate, warhammer crosswise across his knees.

dialog_hooks: complains that the hammers sing wrong in siege-heat
will re-forge a broken heirloom for a week of steel
keeps the forge-fire's debt in a ledger older than the siege
suspects the clan elder is negotiating without the captain's leave
short_desc: A forge-master with beard tied up to his ears, soot so old it looks like tattoos.

dialog_hooks: quotes the clan's debt-ledger at length
knows which passages the Bone-Banner do not
keeps a standing offer: knowledge for knowledge
mourns the books the forge had to burn for fuel
short_desc: A thin dwarven sage in soot-grey robes, eyes pale with too much reading by forgelight.

dialog_hooks: hisses the chieftain's name like a charm
boasts that the forge-fire will gutter when their standards enter it
throws the first javelin without warning
short_desc: A raider in furs and skullpaint, javelin already balanced for the throw.

dialog_hooks: claims to have eaten the previous chieftain, and grins when he says it
wears the forge-master's name on a tooth-necklace
short_desc: A huge man in raven-black mail, a standard of painted skulls lashed to his back.
